author: doll-agent
content: Added the numpy.lib.format-equivalent helpers to ferray-io::format: descr_to_dtype(s) -> DType (wraps existing parse_dtype_str, drops endianness); HeaderData struct + header_data_from_array_1_0(arr) (descr/fortran_order/shape, always emits little-endian, fortran_order=false since ferray arrays are C-contiguous at the public boundary); read_array(reader) -> DynArray and write_array(writer, &DynArray) -> () delegating to existing load_dynamic_from_reader / save_dynamic_to_writer. The existing dtype_to_descr is already present and unchanged. Re-exported via ferray-io lib.rs. 4 unit tests cover descr_to_dtype basic+invalid, header_data_from_array, and round-trip write_array→read_array.
